events.title: Who Gave Them a Mic Comedy Show - Juneteenth Hosted by Derrell Meyers
events.description:
Who Gave Them a Mic is bringing you some of the hottest of New York's stand-up comics. Your favorite comedians and other creatives will be in attendance! Who Gave Them a Mic is a comedy show, house party and creative networking mixer all in one.

Comedian Tata Sherise is a standout contestant and rising star featured on Kevin Hart's Netflix stand-up comedy reality competition, Funny AF. A native of Camden, New Jersey, she has spent years making a name for herself on the East Coast comedy circuit.

events.title: Industry City Gourmet Food and Drinks Tour
events.description:
Set against the iconic backdrop of Sunset Park’s historic waterfront, the massive, revitalized structures of Industry City form a breathtaking stage for an exclusive culinary journey. This premium food and cocktail tour is a curated exploration of taste and craft, transforming an evening into a memorable, high-end experience.
Your adventure begins with artistic bonbons at Lilac Chocolates, explores gourmet imports at Sahadi’s, and includes a refined whiskey tasting at Fort Hamilton Distillery, followed by a sophisticated sake flight. Savor additional artisanal discoveries within the awe-inspiring industrial halls.
Perfect as a distinctive date night, this tour is also fully customizable for private groups and corporate retreats. We specialize in tailoring this engaging experience for team-building and client entertainment, making it an ideal one-day corporate outing. A sophisticated mini-vacation for locals and a profound discovery for visitors.
events.vendor: Industry City Gourmet Food and Drinks Tour

events.title: Father’s Day Intro to Sake Class and Brewery Tour
events.description:
Looking for the perfect Father’s Day experience? This Introduction to Sake tasting class is the ultimate gift for dads who love great drinks and great stories! Join us in person at the Sake Studies Center at Brooklyn Kura in NYC to learn the basics of sake and enjoy a guided tasting of the most delicious sakes. Whether you’re treating Dad or celebrating as a family, we invite you to taste and learn about sake where sake is made! Get a guided brewery tour, taste and explore a set of 5 premium sakes including some fresh from the press — because Dad deserves the good stuff. Let’s level up your sake knowledge and have fun doing it!
What’s included:
A welcome sake to get you started!
Sake 101 presentation to cover all the basics
Guided Tasting of 4 Brooklyn Kura craft sakes as well as a premium sake from Japan
Handouts so you can bring your sake knowledge home
Tasting some sake fresh from the press!
Guided tour through our new Sake Brewery
Some nibbles to pair with your sakes
events.vendor: Father’s Day Intro to Sake Class and Brewery Tour

events.title: Brooklyn Creative Reuse Mending Circle
events.description:
Join Brooklyn Creative Reuse for our first ever Mending Circle! Bring your mending project, learn from your neighbors, or work on your current craft! End your Saturday with a craft, snacks, and good vibes. There will be extra supplies available if needed!
The Mending Circle Series is sponsored by, in part, by the Citizens Committee of New York City’s Community Leaders Grant.

events.title: Puppetworks: Behind the Curtain KIDS!
events.description:
Celebrate the magic of Puppetworks at this special family-friendly event as Brooklyn’s beloved marionette theatre prepares to open its new home at Industry City.
Children and families are invited to enjoy an afternoon of interactive puppet activities, creative workshops, hands-on crafts, special displays, and opportunities to meet Puppetworks artists and performers. Discover the artistry behind puppetry, explore the world of storytelling, and help celebrate nearly 50 years of imagination and live theatre that have inspired generations of Brooklyn families.
Perfect for children of all ages, this free community event offers a fun and memorable way to experience the wonder of Puppetworks and get a first look at its exciting future at Industry City.
Friday, June 26, 2026 | 4:00 PM – 6:00 PM
The Tom Kane Theatre at brooklynONE productions, Industry City

events.title: Friday Night Comedy
events.description: Eastville Comedy Club is Brooklyn's oldest comedy club

events.title: Puppetworks: Behind the Curtain — Community Reception & Future Home Preview
events.description:
Join Industry City, brooklynONE productions, and Puppetworks for a special evening celebrating one of Brooklyn’s most beloved cultural institutions as it prepares to begin its next chapter at Industry City.
This community reception will feature wine and light refreshments, special presentations, community storytelling, a live puppet performance, and an exclusive preview of Puppetworks’ future home. Guests will have the opportunity to tour the new theatre and educational space, hear reflections from artists and supporters, and help commemorate nearly 50 years of imagination, education, and live performance that have touched generations of Brooklyn families.
Whether you grew up attending Puppetworks performances, have supported its mission, or simply believe in the importance of preserving Brooklyn’s cultural institutions, this event offers a unique opportunity to celebrate its legacy and future.
Friday, June 26, 2026 | 7:00 PM – 9:00 PM
The Tom Kane Theatre at brooklynONE productions, Industry City
events.vendor: Puppetworks: Behind the Curtain — Community Reception & Future Home Preview
